entities.name: strategic-partner
entities.context: CLI tool for strategic analysis with configurable dials for challenge, novelty, and structure levels; accepts audio input

entities.name: challenge dial
entities.context: Parameter (0-10) controlling how aggressively to challenge ideas; defaults to 7 for company contexts

entities.name: novel dial
entities.context: Parameter (0-10) controlling novel perspective intensity; defaults to 5

entities.name: structure dial
entities.context: Parameter (0-10) controlling structured output level; defaults to 3

relationships.context: Configurable parameter for adjusting challenge aggressiveness
Configurable parameter for adjusting novel perspective intensity
Configurable parameter for adjusting output structure level
